name: Breville Barista Express Impress Espresso Machine
context: The best default choice for most shoppers. It stands out for assisted tamping.
reason: Best overall for a bundled grinder + espresso workflow: integrated burr grinder, assisted tamping, and PID control—matches the launch guide’s ‘espresso + grinder’ intent without buying separately.

name: Gaggia Classic Evo Pro
context: A lower-priced option for shoppers who want the essentials without paying flagship prices. It stands out for repairable.
reason: Best budget option at $549.0 (under $600 ceiling) with 2 reviewer source(s).

name: Breville Oracle Jet Espresso Machine
context: A premium option for shoppers who want more capability and convenience. It stands out for guided workflow.
reason: Premium upgrade at $2799.99 (above $2500 floor) with 1 reviewer source(s).

name: Profitec Go Espresso Machine
use_case: Best semi-automatic (pair with your own grinder)
context: Best if you care most about semi-automatic (pair with your own grinder). It stands out for simple interface.
reason: Wirecutter’s top semi-automatic for people who want a separate grinder and more hands-on shot quality.
